$description.$value: Typography dimensions for the Prose context — generous spacing optimized for readable body text and long-form content.

xs.$description: Extra-small typography spacing. Use for minimal text gaps, list-marker offsets, tight inline labels.

sm.$description: Small typography spacing. Use for compact paragraph gaps, label padding, form-field spacing.

md.$description: Medium typography spacing. Use for standard text block separation and content area padding.

lg.$description: Large typography spacing. Use for prominent text section gaps and comfortable reading flow.

xl.$description: Extra-large typography spacing. Use for significant visual breaks between text sections.

2xl.$description: 2XL typography spacing. Use for major content-area separation and header spacing.

3xl.$description: 3XL typography spacing. Use for maximum text-related separation and feature-section breaks.

none.$description: Zero typography spacing for collapse and reset.
